title: Property Consultant - Savills India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Savills India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!
